name: pi-oracle
description: pi package that exposes Oracle browser consultations through a custom tool and /oracle workflow.

scripts.validate:wrapper:preview: pi -p '/oracle use dryRunMode summary, attach README.md only, and explicitly state whether a real Oracle consultation occurred.' --no-session --thinking off
scripts.validate:wrapper:error: pi --mode json -p 'Call oracle_consult exactly once with prompt "preview guard test", files ["README.md"], engine "browser", model "gpt-5.4-pro", wait true, dryRunMode "summary", and extraArgs ["--dry-run=full"]. Then stop.' --no-session --thinking off | rg 'tool_execution_end|"isError":true|wrapper-managed'
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run pack:check && npm run validate:wrapper:error && npm run validate:wrapper:preview
